description: FIXED (flipped with the egress-renormalization fix, per the R12 rule; originally pinned the broken raw-index presentation). Provenance: live CLI session 2026-06-11, plan 2026-06-11-001. Construction: document_chunks loads the spy document connector with 8 chunks served in display windows of 5 -- the pre-fetch (P-201 resolves at confidence 1.0, so _gather_context searches documents) registers chunks 1-5 as visible [1]..[5]; the scripted search_documents tool call retrieves the next window, serialized with citation_index 6..8 (offset = the 5 already-registered slots) and registered at those positions. The model's final answer cites [6] and [8] inline with a proper <citations> block. With the fix, _finalize_turn renormalizes the surviving markers to 1..N by first appearance: the user sees [1] and [2], never the raw per-turn indices, and the channel footer enumerates the reordered citations list as matching [n] source:page entries.
user_messages: What is the bearing maintenance plan for P-201?

document_chunks.content: P-201 overview: single-stage centrifugal cooling water pump.
Operating envelope: 45 m3/h nominal flow at 2950 rpm.
Mechanical seal: cartridge type, plan 11 flush.
Coupling: spacer type, laser alignment required after seal work.
Replace the drive-end bearing every 8000 operating hours.
Seal replacement procedure: depressurize, drain, pull cartridge.
Grease the bearing housings with NLGI 2 grease every 500 hours.

turns.content:
Replace the drive-end bearing every 8000 operating hours [6]. Between replacements, grease the bearing housings with NLGI 2 grease every 500 hours [8].

<citations>
[6]
[8]
</citations>
